title: Country Divided
content:
It's unbelievable how "one man":http://www.onopen.com/2006/editor-spaces/390 and his people can divide this little country into pieces. And no one knows how long it will take to repair the damages.

p(me). Mind you, I'm not saying _who's good_ or _who's bad_.

**[ off-topic ]**

Any suggestion on a trip to Singapore? What to see? Where to go? Food? Thanks!
